emeraldbandit.name: THE EMERALD BANDIT
emeraldbandit.desc: ornate emerald-green glowing armor over the hood, gleaming emerald gemstones set in the antlers, regal outlaw

shadowhoof.name: SHADOWHOOF
shadowhoof.desc: pure jet-black shadow fur, piercing glowing green eyes, twin curved daggers crossed, wisps of dark smoke

greenghost.name: THE GREEN GHOST
greenghost.desc: translucent spectral ghostly stag, eerie glowing green mist body, semi-transparent, phantom archer

ironantler.name: IRONANTLER
ironantler.desc: battle-scarred war stag, riveted iron and steel plate armor over the hood, iron-plated antlers, grim

nightshade.name: NIGHTSHADE
nightshade.desc: dark purple hood, glowing violet eyes, holding a dripping purple poison-tipped arrow, toxic mist

emberfletcher.name: EMBER FLETCHER
emberfletcher.desc: glowing orange embers and fire, a flaming arrow, cracked charcoal antlers, sparks flying, fiery eyes

poacher.name: THE POACHER
poacher.desc: rugged fur-and-hide cloak, bone trophies and small antlers on the hood, weathered rough outlaw hunter

coinreaver.name: COINREAVER
coinreaver.desc: greedy grin, clutching a bulging sack of gold coins, gold coins spilling and flying, gold-trimmed hood

frostpoint.name: FROSTPOINT
frostpoint.desc: icy pale-blue frost fur, frost-covered antlers, holding a glowing frozen ice arrow, cold blue mist, snow

hedgerunner.name: HEDGE RUNNER
hedgerunner.desc: lean nimble scout stag, simple worn leather hood, alert quick eyes, light and fast

twobit.name: TWO-BIT ROGUE
twobit.desc: scrappy young outlaw stag, patched ragged hood, cocky crooked grin, small dagger

bramble.name: BRAMBLE SCOUT
bramble.desc: forest-camouflage cloak of leaves and moss, twigs in the antlers, woodland scout, earthy greens

copperarrow.name: COPPER ARROW
copperarrow.desc: modest copper-and-bronze toned hood and gear, a plain copper-tipped arrow, humble outlaw

pickpocket.name: THE PICKPOCKET
pickpocket.desc: small sly grinning outlaw stag, quick fingers holding a stolen coin purse, mischievous, patched hood
